remarks: No obstruction bore hole depth less than 30
No obstruction bore hole less than 30
Mineral particles distributed in organic layer
Subsamples accidentally stored on ice packs for about 3 hours before being frozen in ultralow freezer

Field team was unsure if soil at surface was M or O. Upon closer inspection in the lab it was determined to be mostly mineral. Combined the samples labelled M and O and homogenized before re-subsampling. New subsamples were on ice packs for a little over 1 hour before subsampling occurred
